long_description:
The node is stuck in reclaim and therefore should be powered on, but is not reporting status, indicating possible problem with the smartnic.
Incident source: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/METAL-7765 - Mark Rogalski
short_description: Smartnic in tor3-qz1-sr1-rk162-s18 is not reporting status

current_status_next_steps:
Verify node is powered on via
#bm_node=tor3-qz1-sr1-rk162-s18 ~/repos/platform-inventory/scripts/pds_firmware_setup.sh --powerstatus

If not powered, power on via 
#bm_node=tor3-qz1-sr1-rk162-s18 ~/repos/platform-inventory/scripts/pds_firmware_setup.sh --poweron

Attempt GT-ing to node. If cannot GT, run smartnic recovery runbook.
If you can GT, contact @rogalski for further debug steps.

 -- runbook link -- 
https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/bare_metal_server_network_elba_recovery.html
